shell.subtitle: Control Console
shell.brandBody: Keep data, training, and deployment in one quiet workspace.
shell.workspaceBody: Single workspace mode. Access control is enforced server-side.
route.app.title: Data Workspace Overview
route.app.description: Check status first, then decide which section to visit.
route.projects.title: Project Space
route.projects.description: Organize data, training, and model versions by project.
route.datasets.title: Datasets & Versions
route.datasets.description: Upload samples, freeze versions, then reuse them across training and eval.
route.train.title: Training Jobs
route.train.description: Create jobs and review status, logs, metrics, and artifacts.
route.models.title: Model Registry
route.models.description: Register versions, publish aliases, and keep rollback paths.
route.eval.title: Evaluation Replay
route.eval.description: Compare version results to inform deployment decisions.
route.settings.title: Account & Security
route.settings.description: Manage account, security, and sensitive operations.
route.devices.title: Devices & Firmware
route.devices.description: Device binding, firmware versions, and hardware diagnostics.
route.billing.title: Billing & Plans
route.billing.description: Compute, storage, and team quota management.
dashboard.overviewBody: Check status first, then decide which section to visit.
dashboard.liveSummaryBody: The overview page answers what's in the workspace and where things stand — not four separate stat cards.
dashboard.metric.projectsBody: Project containers in the current workspace.
dashboard.metric.datasetsBody: Data entry points that can be expanded and versioned.
dashboard.quickFlowBody: From data to deployment, stay on the same operational line.
dashboard.rulesBody: This workspace ensures boundaries, rollbacks, and audit trails are always visible.
dashboard.rule0: Uploads and model artifacts go through managed signed paths.
dashboard.rule1: Sensitive operations require Cookie, workspace, and CSRF to all be valid.
dashboard.rule2: Training, eval, and deployment preserve audit information by default.
